tool_args.label: Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown Select Bus Service
payload.description: Proposed Select Bus Service on the Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown corridor from Riverside Drive/Hunts Point, featuring SBS stops, offset bus lanes, Transit Signal Priority, off-board fare collection, and all-door boarding
Potential offset bus lane treatment along the Bx6 corridor
Transit Signal Priority throughout the Bx6 corridor
Off-board fare collection at Bx6 SBS stops, fares paid on street at fare machines
All-door boarding on Bx6 SBS for quicker boarding
Pedestrian safety improvements along the Bx6 corridor
Bx6 SBS kickoff meeting
Target launch of Bx6 SBS service
CB 2 Economic Development Committee Meeting presentation for Bx6 SBS
Bx6 serves nearly 25,000 daily riders
